nodes.name: Reply Webhook
nodes.notes: Receives a pasted inbound customer reply. Expected body shape documented in docs/00 §8.5 and docs/02 Conversation Log: Conversation ID, Lead ID, Contact ID, Channel, Message Content. Secrets/ids are read from $env at runtime, never hardcoded.

nodes.name: Manual Trigger
nodes.notes: Fallback entry for an operator who pasted a reply into Conversation Log directly. Emits the sample reply payload below so the downstream classify step can run without a live webhook.

nodes.name: Merge Entry
nodes.notes: Either entry (webhook or manual) feeds the same classification path.

nodes.name: Classify Reply

parameters.command: python3 scripts/classify_reply.py --json '{"conversation_id":"CONV-20260621-0001","lead_id":"LEAD-20260621-0001","contact_id":"CT-20260621-0001","channel":"Email","direction":"Inbound","message_content":"Can you send me a fulfillment quote for around 50 orders a day and your custom packaging options?"}'

nodes.notes: Local script only (no network). Validates the reply-classifier-v1 JSON schema (intent/urgency/summary/customer_need/recommended_next_action/suggested_reply/should_follow_up/next_followup_days). On invalid JSON or missing fields it exits non-zero so the error branch fires. $env supplies AI keys/table ids; the script must not send anything on its own.

nodes.name: Parse Classification
nodes.notes: Maps classifier output to docs/02 Conversation Log fields EXACTLY: Intent, Urgency, AI Summary, Next Action. Field names match the schema; nothing is invented. Urgency is forced High downstream when Intent == 'Quote Request'.

nodes.name: Update Conversation Log
nodes.notes: Writes the four AI-derived fields back to the Conversation Log record the operator pasted the reply into. record_id comes from the webhook payload; table/app tokens come from $env. No-op if credentials are not configured (n8n will surface a credential error).

nodes.name: Route Quote / Meeting
nodes.notes: Branch true only when the classified intent requires a salesperson task: Quote Request, Meeting Request, or Cooperation. Everything else (Inquiry/Objection/Not Interested/etc.) terminates after the Conversation Log writeback.

nodes.name: Create Quote / Meeting Task

parameters.fields: ={{JSON.stringify({"Lead ID":$('Reply Webhook').item.json.body.lead_id || $('Reply Webhook').item.json.body["Lead ID"] || "","Contact ID":$('Reply Webhook').item.json.body.contact_id || $('Reply Webhook').item.json.body["Contact ID"] || "","Owner":$('Reply Webhook').item.json.body.owner || "","Channel":$('Reply Webhook').item.json.body.channel || "Email","Message Type":$json["Intent"] === "Meeting Request" ? "Reply" : "Quote Explanation","AI Draft":"","Human Edited Version":"","Approval Status":"Pending Review","Send Status":"Not Sent","Result":$json["Intent"] === "Quote Request" ? "Need Quote" : ($json["Intent"] === "Meeting Request" ? "Need Meeting" : "Interested"),"Notes":"Auto-created from reply classification. Human review required."})}}

nodes.notes: Creates a review-only Outreach Task row. Draft-only by contract: Approval Status=Pending Review, Send Status=Not Sent. Message Type and Result are derived from Intent per docs/02 Outreach Task options. No auto-send.

nodes.name: Error / Invalid Classification
nodes.notes: Reaches here only when Classify Reply exits non-zero (invalid AI JSON / schema violation / missing script). Emits a structured error record. No partial Conversation Log write happens on this path.

meta.asg_boundary: classify pasted inbound replies only; no mailbox automation, no auto-send in V1. Quote/Meeting rows are draft-only (Pending Review / Not Sent). Credentials and table ids come from $env.
